name: Colosseum
fullText:
While Solana's Frontier Hackathon is online, we're inviting a select group of founders to build IRL at Colosseum's SF office during the competition.

Approved devs get a desk/monitor + an interview for our next accelerator batch.

SF Build Station | Apply: https://t.co/pwYBCBOTOD https://t.co/BTdWhV25Tu
